zh.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort於1050年出生在法國諾門迪。她和Thurstan De Brastenburg至少有1個兒子。她去世於1091年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年41歲。

zh-hans.Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, Unite: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort于1050年出生在法国諾門迪。她和Thurstan De Brastenburg至少有1个儿子。她去世于1091年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort was born in 1050, in Normandy, France. She had at least 1 son with Thurstan De Brastenburg. She died in 1091, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort est née en 1050, à Normandie, France. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Thurstan De Brastenburg. Elle est décédée en 1091, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort wurde 1050 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Sie hatte mit Thurstan De Brastenburg mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1091 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort è nata il nel 1050 nel Normandie, Francia. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Thurstan De Brastenburg. Morì nel 1091, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Normandy, France: フランスノーマンディ
ja.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfortは1050年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた。彼女はThurstan De Brastenburgとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1091年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort(은)는 1050년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Thurstan De Brastenburg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1091년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort nasceu em 1050, em Normandie, França. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Thurstan De Brastenburg. Ela faleceu em 1091, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort родилась в 1050 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Thurstan De Brastenburg. Она умерла в 1091 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Alice De Montfort nació en 1050, en Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Thurstan De Brastenburg. Murió en 1091, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años.
